reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate account
reauth_confirm.description: Gmail access expired or was revoked. Sign in with Google again to continue.

abort.already_configured: This Gmail account is already configured.
abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not query Gmail with the obtained token.
abort.missing_configuration: Register the OAuth credential (client ID/secret) in Application Credentials first.
abort.missing_credentials: Register the OAuth credential (client ID/secret) in Application Credentials first.
abort.no_url_available: No URL available — check Home Assistant external URL configuration.

create_entry.default: Gmail account linked. Configure the model endpoint in the integration options.

data.modo_sombra_exclusao: Shadow mode (trash candidates only get a label)
data.dry_run: Dry run (nothing is applied to Gmail)

data_description.llm_base_url: Any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (LM Studio, Ollama, vLLM...).
data_description.modo_sombra_exclusao: Turn off only after reviewing the candidates for a few days.

application_credentials.description: Create a **Web** OAuth app in the [Google Cloud Console]({oauth_creds_url}) with redirect URI `{redirect_url}` and paste the Client ID and Client Secret here. Step-by-step guide: [documentation]({docs_url}).

executar.name: Run triage
executar.description: Runs email triage for one account (or all).

conta.name: Account
conta.description: Account email. Empty = all configured accounts.

max.name: Maximum
max.description: Email limit for this run (default: account option).

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: Applies nothing to Gmail, only logs what it would do.

reprocessar.name: Reprocess
reprocessar.description: Do not skip emails already processed by Polaris.

sugerir_categorias.name: Suggest categories
sugerir_categorias.description: Samples the mailbox and suggests new categories (notification with the list).

max.name: Sample
max.description: How many recent emails to sample.

aceitar_categorias.name: Accept suggested categories
aceitar_categorias.description: Adds the accepted suggestions to the account's categorias.yaml.
